recommendations.title: Train to Busan
recommendations.overview: When a zombie virus pushes Korea into a state of emergency, those trapped on an express train to Busan must fight for their own survival.

recommendations.title: Seoul Station
recommendations.genres: Animation, Horror, Science Fiction, Action, Thriller
recommendations.overview: In this animated prequel to "Train to Busan," a group of survivors deals with a zombie pandemic that unleashes itself in downtown Seoul.

recommendations.title: Psychokinesis
recommendations.overview: An ordinary guy suddenly finds he has superpowers he can use to help his spirited daughter and the people around them, but he also runs into trouble in the process.

recommendations.title: JUNG_E
recommendations.overview: On an uninhabitable 22nd-century Earth, the outcome of a civil war hinges on cloning the brain of an elite soldier to create a robot mercenary.

recommendations.title: Revelations
recommendations.overview: A pastor who believes in divine revelation and a detective haunted by visions pursue a missing person case — exposing their own demons in the process.

recommendations.title: The Man Standing Next
recommendations.overview: When the investigation of 'Koreagate' takes place, Park Yong-gak, a former KCIA director who knows everything about the government's operations, heads to the United States in exile.

recommendations.title: Time to Hunt
recommendations.overview: Four young men want to leave their dystopian world behind and go to a distant paradise to execute a money robbery, a daring act that will have unexpected consequences.

recommendations.title: The Dude in Me
recommendations.overview: Dong-hyun is a high school student. One day, he falls from the rooftop and bumps into Pan-soo who is a passerby. Pan-soo is a member of a criminal organization. When the two men wake up in the hospital, they discover that they have switched bodies.

recommendations.title: Red Shoes and the Seven Dwarfs
recommendations.genres: Animation, Fantasy, Family, Comedy, Romance, Adventure
recommendations.overview: Princes who have been turned into Dwarfs seek the red shoes of a lady in order to break the spell, although it will not be easy.

recommendations.title: A Taxi Driver
recommendations.overview: May, 1980. Man-seob is a taxi driver in Seoul who lives from hand to mouth, raising his young daughter alone. One day, he hears that there is a foreigner who will pay big money for a drive down to Gwangju city. Not knowing that he’s a German journali
